_instructions: Add your thoughts in the fields below. Each key matches a node or edge ID from graph.json. Set 'finn_thoughts' to any string. Redeploy to GitHub Pages to see them in the visualization.

lorde.finn_thoughts: I had no idea she was from New Zealand (or Croatia for that matter), I always assumed she was American. Interesting that she was capable of reading 40,000 words of pure academia at only 14 years old, very impressive really.

jack.finn_thoughts: Just not very hot really, quite surprised he's managed to be part of so much drama.

lena.finn_thoughts: I don't know who this is but the evidence she indirectly caused Hilary to lose the election is quite compelling. I do feel sorry for her reading through all of this in some ways but she also seems a bit strange and all celebs are a bit weird aren't they? So maybe she's not so bad?

james.finn_thoughts: Literally just a certified nonce, not someone I would associate with

taylor.finn_thoughts: I find Taylor swift annoying in some ways but also think she gets shat on a bit too much at times. Not fully up to date with the drama but seems like she's a quiet influence in the whole thing. I've always had republican vibes from her (I know she eventually endorsed Kamala but still) - is it possible she's actually undercover for the republicans and orchestrated the whole thing to get Trump elected??? See also: Grimes on this.

sonja.finn_thoughts: Crazy Mum clearly, but crazy people seem to do well. Some level of respect for her but I would have thought she'd intervene with this nonce James guy dating her daughter.

grimes.finn_thoughts: I love Grimes' music. Real shame she went all in for Elon but that is kind of on brand in some ways. The same with Taylor, is she actually undercover? It would explain the relationship between Elon Musk and Trump in the most recent years. This could be a deep scandal.

green_light.finn_thoughts: The line about being bitten by a shark is so random lol, this distracted me from everything else

coachella_2016.finn_thoughts: This is something I've really reflected on. Lots of people say 2016 was the end of the world / when everything started to go to shit. It could have been caused by Lorde and Jack and their Coachella fling, the more I think about it the more connected all of this seems.

snl_2017.finn_thoughts: I get the wedding dress point, however it doesn't necessarily align with the point on them 'boning', it could have been more provocative?
